---
title: "Certificates"
subtitle: "Continuous education and professional certifications in data science and engineering."
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-title: "Categories"
---

Below are the most relevant certificates in my professional development.

## Data Science & Machine Learning

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Associate Data Scientist in Python
**DataCamp** · 90 hours · May 2025

![](images/certificados/associate_data_scientist_in_python.png){.img-fluid .rounded}

**Topics:**

* Python for Data Science
* Exploratory and Statistical Analysis
* Supervised Machine Learning

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Data Science</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">DataCamp</span>
<br><br>
[📄 View Certificate (PDF)](certificados/Associate%20data%20scientist%20in%20python.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Machine Learning Scientist in Python
**DataCamp** · 85 hours · November 2024

![](images/certificados/machine_learning_scientist_in_python.png){.img-fluid .rounded}

**Topics:**

* Supervised and Unsupervised Models
* Deep Learning Fundamentals
* Feature Engineering

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">DataCamp</span>
<br><br>
[📄 View Certificate (PDF)](certificados/Machine%20learning%20scientist%20in%20python.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## Data Analysis

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Data Analyst in Python
**DataCamp** · 36 hours · November 2023

![](images/certificados/data_analyst_in_python.png){.img-fluid .rounded}

**Topics:**

* Data Manipulation with Pandas
* Data Visualization
* Statistical Analysis

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Data Analysis</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">DataCamp</span>
<br><br>
[📄 View Certificate (PDF)](certificados/Data%20analyst%20in%20python.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## Engineering & Simulation

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Introduction to Aspen HYSYS
**Universidad de Sonora** · 20 hours · November 2022

![](images/certificados/aspen_hysys.png){.img-fluid .rounded}

**Topics:**

* Chemical Process Simulation
* Chemical Engineering and Metallurgy
* Industrial Design Tools

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Engineering</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Simulation</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">UNISON</span>
<br><br>
[📄 View Certificate (PDF)](certificados/ASPEN_HYSYS.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::
